MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-563381, CGC-18-564535 WITH CASE CGC-17-556319 AND TO VACATE TRIAL (TRANSACTION ID # 61878345) FILED BY DEFENDANT MARGARITO, ESTEVEZ HEARING SET FOR APR-27-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ESTEVEZ MARGARITO'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS CGC-17-563381, CGC-18-564535 AND CGC-17-556319 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. CASES CGC-17-563381, CGC-18-564535 AND CGC-17-556319 ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. CGC-17-556319 IS DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FURTHER FILINGS SHALL BE UNDER THAT CASE NUMBER. THE TRIAL DATE OF JUNE 4, 2018 IN CASE CGC-17-556319 IS VACATED. THE PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER REGARDING A NEW TRIAL DATE FOR THE CONSOLIDATED CASE AND MAKE A JOINT APPLICATION TO DEPARTMENT 206 REGARDING THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, E-MAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.ORG (L&M302)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-14-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2018 Set For Trial On Feb-04-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MARGARITO ESTEVEZ'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT.

Defendant Estevez Margarito's motion to strike the punitive damages allegations in the complaint filed by plaintiffs Ruth Garcia and Claudia Perez is denied. Liberally construed, the allegations of the complaint allege that Mr. Estevez chose to drive a vehicle knowing that he was intoxicated and could not drive safely. This is sufficient to show, for pleading purposes, despicable conduct carried on with a willful and conscious disregard for the safety of others.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Set For Case Management Conference On Jul-25-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-563381, CGC-18-564535 WITH CASE CGC-17-556319
Off Calendar Apr-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT ESTEVEZ MARGARITO'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS CGC-17-563381, CGC-18-564535 and CGC-17-556319 is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Cases CGC-17-563381, CGC-18-564535 and CGC-17-556319 are consolidated for all purposes. CGC-17-556319 is designated the lead case and all further filings shall be under that case number. The trial date of June 4, 2018 in case CGC-17-556319 is vacated. The parties shall meet and confer regarding a new trial date for the consolidated case and make a joint application to Department 206 regarding the new trial date.

The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, e-mail: torreanom@aol.org (L&M302)
